officeGroups.name: Frontline Services
officeGroups.description: Resident-facing offices that issue documents and handle day-to-day transactions

officeGroups.name: Administration
officeGroups.description: Internal governance, personnel, and records offices of the LGU

offices.name: City Civil Registry
offices.description: Birth, death, marriage registration, corrections, and certified copies
offices.location: 1st Floor, Administrative Building, Las Piñas City Hall Compound
additionalServices: Certified True Copy of Civil Documents
Correction of Clerical Error / Change of First Name (RA 9048)
Correction of Birth Date or Sex (RA 10172)

detail.description: Birth, death, marriage registration, corrections, and certified copies

processSteps.title: Identify Service
processSteps.description: Determine what civil registry service you need.

processSteps.title: Prepare Documents
processSteps.description: Gather all required documents for your transaction.

processSteps.title: Visit Office
processSteps.description: Go to Civil Registry, 1st Floor, Administrative Building.

processSteps.title: Submit Application
processSteps.description: Submit documents and pay applicable fees.

faqs.question: What services are offered?
faqs.answer: Birth, death, marriage registration; certified copies; corrections; late registration; legitimation; and other civil registry services.

offices.name: Barangay Hall
offices.description: Barangay clearances, IDs, and certificates of residency

offices.name: PNP Station
offices.description: Police clearances and community safety coordination

offices.name: Human Resource Management
offices.description: Service records, employment certificates, leave credits for LGU employees

offices.location: City Hall, Ground Floor, Las Piñas City Hall Compound

offices.name: City Assessor's Office
offices.description: Property assessment, tax declarations, land records, and real property appraisal
offices.location: City Hall, Ground Floor, Las Piñas City Hall Compound

offices.name: City Social Welfare & Development Office (CSWDO)
offices.description: Social welfare programs, indigency certificates, AICS, PWD and senior citizen assistance

offices.name: City Agriculture Office
offices.description: Agricultural programs, farmer registration, subsidized inputs, and livelihood assistance

offices.name: City Engineering Office
offices.description: Building permits, construction inspection, infrastructure projects, and road maintenance

offices.name: City Planning & Development Office
offices.description: Zoning certificates, locational clearances, land use planning, and development permits
offices.location: City Hall, Las Piñas City Hall Compound

offices.name: City Health Office
offices.description: Public health services, vaccination programs, health certificates, and medical assistance
offices.location: City Hall Compound, Las Piñas City

offices.name: City Disaster Risk Reduction & Management Office (CDRRMO)
offices.description: 24/7 emergency response, rescue operations, and disaster preparedness programs

offices.name: City Budget Office

offices.location: City Hall, Las Piñas City Hall Compound

offices.name: City Accounting Office
offices.description: Pre-audit of disbursements, payroll processing, check issuance, and financial reporting
